name: Texas Lava Chili
recipeIngredient: 6 green jalapeno peppers, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into 1-inch cubes.
2. Heat peanut oil in a large cast iron pot over medium-high heat.
3. Add onions and garlic; cook until softened.
4. Add meat cubes and 1 tablespoon cumin; brown the meat.
5. Stir in tomato sauce, beer, whiskey, Coca-Cola, peppers, spices (except 1 tablespoon cumin), and cook on low heat for 45 minutes, stirring often.
6. Uncover and cook for an additional 20 minutes.
7. Stir in the remaining cumin and serve.
Origin: Don Houston's chili pot, circa 1993
